text: A red fire hydrant near a city sidewalk at night.
Clock on the side of towering building during sunset.
A yellow fire hydrant made to look like it is frowning.
A small elephant standing next to a wire fence.
Apples on a tree that need longer to ripen.
A small girl in action on a court with a racket.
a zebra eating grass in the wild, with trees.
There are two large slices of mushroom pizza.
A piece of cake sitting on top of a white plate.
A little kid holding a sandwich in their hands.
